accessory.name: Original
accessory.notes: A vintage can be sold for 50% of its purchase price.

accessory.name: Original (Melee)
accessory.notes: A vintage can be sold for 50% of its purchase price.

accessory.name: Paired Melee Weapons (Lv 1)
accessory.notes: This attachment means the weapon represents two identical weapons benefiting from 1 purchase of Two Weapon Style Attack.

accessory.name: Paired Ranged Weapons (Lv 1)
accessory.notes: This attachment means the weapon represents two identical weapons benefiting from 1 purchase of Dual Pistol Firing.

accessory.name: Paired Pistol Crossbows (Lv 1)
accessory.notes: This attachment means the weapon represents two identical weapons benefiting from 1 purchase of Dual Pistol Firing.

accessory.name: Paired Melee Weapons (Lv 2)
accessory.notes: This attachment means the weapon represents two identical weapons benefiting from 2 purchases of Two Weapon Style Attack.

accessory.name: Paired Ranged Weapons (Lv 2)
accessory.notes: This attachment means the weapon represents two identical weapons benefiting from 2 purchases of Dual Pistol Firing.

accessory.name: Paired Pistol Crossbows (Lv 2)
accessory.notes: This attachment means the weapon represents two identical weapons benefiting from 2 purchases of Dual Pistol Firing.

accessory.name: Raijin Rapid Release Sheath™
accessory.notes:
The Raijin Rapid Release Sheath™ is brought to you by the brilliant engineers at Renraku. The sheath makes use of an internal battery pack to allow for quite the explosive draw of your blade. Guaranteed to remove limbs, and defeat foes through sheer Shock and Awe. Though they are a bit difficult to use, requiring some training on how to draw a blade at incredible speeds, they offer an incredible burst of damage and penetration for a strike used after the draw.
It requires a Quick Draw action to use, and requires the user to make a Reaction + Blades (4) test, in addition to knowing either the Iaijutsu martial art or having the Rapid Draw adept power to accomplish this. A failure on this roll will cause the user to have to chase their blade as it launches 10 meters in the direction they were facing. A critical glitch requires the user to soak damage equal to their weapon's damage +5 and AP value.
Success on this roll will increase their damage and Armor Penetration for this immediate strike by 2 and -2 respectively. The sheath only has enough power for 1 use, after which it requires a charge time of 30 seconds through wireless induction. This may only be used with blades that can be reasonably wielded with 1 hand, such as the Katana or Monosword, and may be used with two weapons at the same time assuming you have two sheathes.

accessory.name: Deft Thrower Damage Boost
accessory.notes: Can NOT be applied to grenades!

weapon.name: Competition Pads
weapon.notes: Deals damage equal to your Unarmed Attack, but always as Stun.

weapon.name: Victorinox Smartstaff
weapon.notes: Conceal -1 when undeployed. Changing forms is a Simple action, Free if wireless.

weapon.name: rEVOlution Arms Cheetah
weapon.notes: The Cheetah is a Super Machine Gun and can fire Narrow Bursts.

weapon.name: AN-94
weapon.notes: Can fire narrow bursts in simple BF mode (and only simple BF mode) for +1 damage/-1 AP

weapon.name: AN-74
weapon.notes: Can fire narrow bursts in simple BF mode (and only simple BF mode) for +1 damage/-1 AP

weapon.name: AR-15
weapon.notes: Can be fired with the Longarms (Sporting Rifle) skill at no penalty.

weapon.name: XM-629 OICW
weapon.notes: The MCT Tachi can provide teamwork assistance to weapon attacks via the Use Skill Complex Action.

weapon.name: Ares HVBR
weapon.notes: Can fire Narrow Bursts. +2 damage/-2 AP in Simple, +4 damage/-4 AP in Complex.

weapon.name: Ingram Black Knight
weapon.notes: Base Accuracy is 5 when firing FA.

weapon.name: Ares HV MP-LMG
weapon.notes: Generates 1 recoil per 2 bullets (instead of 1 per 1). Can fire Narrow Bursts when making BF or Simple FA attacks.

weapon.name: MTR
weapon.notes: Comes loaded, cannot be reloaded. Discarded after firing. Sensor Rating 5.

weapon.name: Ares Shockbeam
weapon.notes: Loses damage as a laser weapon. Uses 2 power points per shot.
